subject: Opener great; airline bit long
body: Your opener landed, but the airline bit ran long—tighten the setup and cut one example.

subject: Timing note
body: Punchlines were great; pause longer before the guitar callback so it pops more.

subject: Cleaner works better
body: The clean material hit harder than the dark joke about roommates—maybe swap the order.

subject: Transitions
body: Loved the crowd work but the transition into the dating app bit felt abrupt—maybe a quick tag to bridge them.

subject: Too short
body: Closer hit but I wanted one more callback—set felt a bit short.

subject: Opener suggestion
body: Open with the crowd work instead of the airline bit; room was chatty and you already owned them.

subject: Guitar piece
body: The guitar song was fun but under-miked. Maybe skip it in small rooms.

subject: Beat timing
body: Some beats felt rushed—leave space after the self-deprecating line.

subject: Rambling
body: Story about your uncle was a bit long; tighten the setup.

subject: Transitions (same)
body: Loved the crowd work but the transition into the dating app bit felt abrupt—maybe a quick tag to bridge them.

subject: Too much crowd work
body: Crowd work was fun but maybe trim one exchange to get to the new bits quicker.
